title: Nina Aquila: Legal Eagle, Chapter IV: "Sacred Feathers"

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WindowsR 7/8/8.1/10 (32bit/64bit)
  • Processor: i5–7400 or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti or better
  • Storage: 1200 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Older i3/i5 systems with onboard graphics may experience performance issues. We recommend systems with a dedicated graphics card.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-12400F or better
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX1660 SUPER or better
  • Storage: 1200 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Most gaming systems from ~2019 or later with a dedicated graphics card should be able to run the game to an acceptable level.
